',p+='<option value="postal-code">postal-code  ----  post code, zip code, cedex code</option>

',p+='<option value="tel-national">tel-national</option>
',p+='<option value="tel-area-code">tel-area-code</option>
',p+='<option value="tel-local">tel-local</option>

',p+='<option value="tel-local-suffix">tel-local-suffix</option>
',p+='<option value="tel-extension">tel-extension</option>
',p+='<optgroup label="Passwords">
',p+='<option value="new-password">new-password</option>
',p+='<option value="current-password">current-password</option>
',p+='<option value="one-time-code">one-time-code  ----  one-time-password, otp, otc</option>
',p+='<optgroup label="Credit Card/Financial">
',p+='<option value="cc-name">cc-name  ----  credit card full name</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-given-name">cc-given-name  ----  credit card first name</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-additional-name">cc-additional-name  ----  credit card middle-name</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-family-name">cc-family-name  ----  credit card surname</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-number">cc-number</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-exp">cc-exp  ----  credit card expiry date</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-exp-month">cc-exp-month  ----  credit card expiry month</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-exp-year">cc-exp-year  ----  credit card expiry year</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-csc">cc-csc  ----  credit card cvc 3-digit code</option>
',p+='<option value="cc-type">cc-type  ----  credit card type</option>
',p+='<option value="transaction-currency">transaction-currency</option>
',p+='<option value="transaction-amount">transaction-amount</option>
',p+='<optgroup label="Date of Birth">
',p+='<option value="bday">bday  ----  birthday</option>
',p+='<option value="bday-day">bday-day  ----  birthday day</option>
',p+='<option value="bday-month">bday-month  ----  birthday month</option>
',p+='<option value="bday-year">bday-year  ----  birthday year</option>
',p+='<optgroup label="Other">
',p+='<option value="organization-title">organization-title  ----  job title</option>
',p+='<option value="organization">organization  ----  company-name, company</option>
',p+='<option value="email">email</option>
',p+='<option value="url">url  ----  web address/homepage</option>
',p+='<option value="photo">photo  ----  image, avatar, icon</option>
',p+='<option value="impp">impp</option>
',p+='<option value="off">off</option>

children.description: Lets you pick autocomplete values for fields that lack them with easier-to-understand categories.

children.description: Finds grouped fields (radios, checkboxes etc) and reveals how the accessible name for the group is derived.
